name_cn:
Pochette Métis #M44876# Uninspected Version
▪️Dimensions: 25*19*7cm▪️
The iconic Monogram paired with trendy Yellow Gold creates a more fashionable look for the classic King.
This classic messenger bag has become a must-have for every woman to create a stylish look.
Featuring an internal compartment design, its capacity earns full marks,
Compared to the classic Monochrome, this colorway is even more beloved!
